---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Ctrl+Alt+I adds the code chunks

```{r}
# List all csvs and rename
CSVfiles <- list.files(path = "data",
                      pattern="\\.csv$", full.names=TRUE)
print(CSVfiles)
dataframe_names <- CSVfiles %>% str_replace_all(c(".csv" = "", "./" = ""))
 print(dataframe_names)


# Read CSVs into a large list and combine into one dataframe
dat <- lapply(CSVfiles, FUN = function(x) fread(x)) %>%
  set_names(dataframe_names)
data <- bind_rows(dat, .id = "column_label")


##FILTERING DATA BY JED'S CRITERIA
a <- filter(data, Target_length_mean > 40)
b <- filter(a, (Target_range_mean > 5 & Num_targets > 25) | Target_range_mean <5) 
c <- filter(b, (Direction_horizontal > 140 & Direction_horizontal < 285) | 
                   (Direction_horizontal > 5 & Direction_horizontal < 25))


#Bin fish as up or down
pdata <- mutate(c, updown = if_else((Direction_horizontal < 285 & Direction_horizontal > 140),
                                   "up",
                                   "down"))
```
